text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 33 

OTHR_TROOP_AMT 

LABEL: Other True Out-of-Pocket (TrOOP) Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This is the amount of any payment made by other third-party payers that reduces the beneficiary’s 
liability for the PDE and counts towards Part D’s true out-of-pocket (TrOOP) requirement. Two 
examples are payments by qualified state pharmacy assistance programs or charities.
